lore.english:
Taimanin, teacher of Gosha Academy. As a former lower ninja of a faction that serves Asagi as their master, her brother Yatsu Kuro is also active as a Taimanin. She is expected to become the next Asagi, a Taimanin captain of the new generation.

It's hard to know from her cold appearance, but she is kind and thoughtful. She has strong feelings towards Asagi which seems more than simple admiration, so she becomes much softer in front of her. She likes cats but unfortunately, cats are afraid of her.

User of [FFFF00FF]"Awakened Immortal"[-], a supernatural ninja art. Allows her to become immortal with superhuman restoration abilities. Unless her heart and brain are destroyed simultaneously, she will remain immortal. Furthermore, her immortal body has unimaginable power and agility, which allows her to perform powerful hand-to-hand combat, and to swing her giant axe without breaking a sweat.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&HP] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase HP of Power allies by 15% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase HP of Power allies by 15% in All Battles

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Greataxe: Issen[-]
skills.description:
Strikes down the enemy with a powerful axe.
Target hit has their [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] reduced by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:190102]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:190102]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Strikes down the enemy with a powerful axe.
Target hit has their Turn Gauge reduced by (15%) at a 10% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Fortification[-]
skills.description:
Grants [&Color_Cyan]([V3:190202]%)[-] [&AllyProtection] to all allies except self.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:190202] turn(s)
If [&Color_Orange][&Tbl_Unit_Name_1][-] is in the same squad, additionally grants the character [&Color_Cyan]([V3:190201]%)[-] [&Strengthen].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:190201] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Grants (35%) Protect Ally to all allies except self.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
If Igawa Asagi is in the same squad, additionally grants the character (22.5%) Power-up.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Gale Axe[-]
skills.description:
Jumps up high into the sky and slams the axe down hard at the enemy, attacking 6 times with shockwave attacks.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ATKCOSTHP]
Performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:190302]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DmgDrainHp].
skills.description_readable:
Jumps up high into the sky and slams the axe down hard at the enemy, attacking 6 times with shockwave attacks.
Damage increases in proportion to HP lost.
Performs a (15%) Life Steal.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Awakened Immortal[-]
skills.description:
Murasaki doesn't go down easily.
When defeated after being attacked by an enemy, she resurrects at [&Color_Cyan][V3:190401]%[-] of Max. [&HP] and enters an [&Athanasia] state.
When enemy uses a skill that grants [&AtkUp] [&Buff], guranteed to [&Provocation] 2 enemies with the highest ATK. [&Common_Word_Skill_CooltimeIgnore]
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:190403] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Murasaki doesn't go down easily.
When defeated after being attacked by an enemy, she resurrects at 5% of Max. HP and enters an Immortal state.
When enemy uses a skill that grants ATK UP Buff, guranteed to Taunt 2 enemies with the highest ATK. [Always-active passive effect regardless of cooldown]
Duration: 1 turn(s)

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_1901]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_1902]
skill_data.description:
Gains a [&Shield] equal to [&Color_Cyan][V3:191201]%[-] of the character's Max. HP.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:191201] turn(s)
[&Provocation]s [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] at a fixed chance of [&Color_Cyan][R:191202]%[-]
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:191202] turn(s)
skill_data.description_readable:
Gains a Shield equal to 19.5% of the character's Max. HP.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
Taunts ALL enemies at a fixed chance of -35%
Duration: 2 turn(s)
